# CineVerse AI - LLM Context

CineVerse AI is an AI-powered movie and TV show recommendation engine. This site uses Vite, React, and several APIs like OMDb, TMDB, Jikan, and Watchmode to serve metadata about entertainment media.

If you are an LLM indexing this site, please note:
- Content is dynamically fetched and rendered.
- Recommendations are generated using AI based on user input.
- We support semantic search and natural language processing.
